code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_number = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
mut has_digits = false

while i < n
  mut b = 0
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    b = x
  when None
    b = 0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digits = true
    in_number = true
  else if b == 45 and not in_number
    sign = -1
    in_number = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_number
    in_number = true
  else
    if has_digits
      if sign * value > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
    in_number = false
    sign = 1
    value = 0
    has_digits = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digits
  if sign * value > 0
    count = count + 1
  end
end

println("positive=#{count}")
